name: pmm-ops
description: SuperPMM — AI-powered GTM Builder for Product Marketers. One guided workflow with 5 steps (Research → CI → PRFAQ → Positioning → GTM Plan) that produces a complete ICP, competitive analysis, PRFAQ, positioning, and launch plan in ~60 minutes. Frameworks: FletchPMM, April Dunford, Winning by Design, Atlassian.
